format.raw: 2016-01-23 17:36:39.84100 tap0.test.JATP.net CEF:0|JATP|Cortex|3.6.0.15|cnc|TROJAN.$ATTACK_NAME|7|externalId=$CONN_ID eventId=123 lastActivityTime=2016-01-23 17:36:39.84100 src=$SRC_IP dst=$DST_IP malwareSeverity=0.5 malwareCategory=TrojanDataTheft cncServers=$SRC_IP

xml.raw:
<Policy>
  <Parser parser_key="{@parser_key}" type="1" separator="CEF" version="0" arr_length="-1">
    <Field position="0"  name="device_version" />
    <Field position="1"  name="severity" />
    <Field position="2"  name="device_product" />
    <Field position="3"  name="event_id" />
    <Field position="4"  name="attack_nm"      convert_tag="[[@toLowerCase()]]" />
    <Field position="5"  name="dstn_ip"        org_name="dst" />
    <Field position="6"  name="src_ip"         org_name="src" />
    <Field position="7"  name="cnc_servers" />
    <Field position="8"  name="external_id" />
    <Field position="9"  name="cef_version" />
    <Field position="10" name="malware_severity" />
    <Field position="11" name="signature_id" />
    <Field position="12" name="malware_category" />
    <Field position="13" name="device_vendor" />
    <Field position="14" name="logdt"          org_name="lastActivityTime" convert_tag="[[@date('yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.84100','yyyyMMddHHmmss')]]" />
    <Field position="15" name="vendor"         convert_tag="[[@set('junipernetworks')]]" />
    <Field position="16" name="model"          convert_tag="[[@set('jatpcortex')]]" />
    <Field position="17" name="logtype"        convert_tag="[[@set('security')]]" />
    <Field position="18" name="parser_version"  convert_tag="[[@set('v1')]]" />
    <Field position="19" name="original_log"   convert_tag="[[@originalLog()]]" />
    <Field position="20" name="parser_info"    convert_tag="[[@set('[Juniper]_jatp_security_v1_cef')]]" />
    <Field position="21" name="eqp_type"       convert_tag="[[@set('ATP')]]" />
  </Parser>
</Policy>
